item.title: About Me
item.description: I am a cybersecurity specialist and bug bounty hunter from Pakistan, known for my contributions to the information security community. I hold certifications including Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) and Ethical Hacking Expert (EHE) from eHunar, a Government of Pakistan institute. I have been recognized in NASA’s Hall of Fame for my hacking achievements. I actively share my knowledge through articles on Medium, focusing on topics like reconnaissance methodologies and the use of tools such as Netlas.
